title: Executive Order 6202—Phosphate Restoration No. 54
text:
WYOMING
So much of Executive order of July 2, 1910, creating Phosphate Reserve No. 4, Wyoming No. 1, as affects the land hereinafter described is hereby revoked:
SIXTH PRINCIPAL MERIDIAN
T. 38 N., R. 114 W., sec. 4, Mineral Survey No. 553 (Granite Placer claim).
(Unsurveyed)
FRANKLIN D. ROOSEVELT
The White House,
July 11, 1933.
